summary: MakerWorld does not expose a usable remix graph via the API; ship 'tags' (multi-tag intersection) instead of a remix-lineage feature.
reason: GET /design-service/design/{id}/remixed returns total:0 for every design tested (including gridfinity), and 'originals' is empty everywhere. A 'lineage' feature built on /remixed is correct but data-starved (root-only). The shipped 4th novel feature is 'tags', backed by the 100%-populated tags field. A regen must not reinstate lineage as a flagship feature.
